info.english_meaning: to sing to make an indistinct sound to speak inarticulately

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tatra haMsAH plavAH krOYcAH sArasAScEva rAGava valgusvarA vikUjanti' (rA0 3767) nAnA vASyanta ityarTaH viSabdo nAnArTe
'eza kroSati dAtyUhastaM SiKI pratikUjati' (rA0 2569) pratikUjati dAtyUhaM sparDamAnaH kUjati
'paryakUji sarujeva taruRyAstAralolavalayena kareRa' (sA0 da0) paryakUji parito guYjitam sarvato virutam
